listOfQuestions.question: In Theatre and Performance, what does "Script" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: The written text of a performance
wrongAnswers: An extended speech by one performer
The physical environment built for a performance
The person coordinating rehearsals and live performance logistics

listOfQuestions.question: In Theatre and Performance, what does "Dialogue" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Words spoken by characters
wrongAnswers: A script note describing action, movement, or setting
Clothing worn by performers to support character and setting
Practice time used to prepare a performance

listOfQuestions.question: In Theatre and Performance, what does "Monologue" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An extended speech by one performer
wrongAnswers: Planned movement and positioning of actors
Planning light to shape visibility, mood, and focus
Creating performance material spontaneously

listOfQuestions.question: In Theatre and Performance, what does "Stage direction" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A script note describing action, movement, or setting
wrongAnswers: A signal for an actor or technician to act
Planning audio elements for a production
Choices that create a believable character

wrongAnswers: An object handled or used by performers
